title: cyclosorus ceramicus
intro: Cyclosorus ceramicus, also known as the Chinese Leopards Bane, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family, typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus ceramicus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also sometimes dried and used in capsules or powder form for its medicinal properties.
